policies.refund_policy: No refunds after 7 days of purchase.
policies.support: 24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan. Basic plan users get email support.
policies.trial: No free trial currently available. Plans can be cancelled anytime before next billing cycle.

company.name: AutoStream
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform providing automated AI-powered video editing tools for content creators on YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and more.
